summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomy and systematics of the freshwater algal class Conjugatophyceae (formerly Zygnematophyceae), with a particular emphasis on the genera *Mougeotia*, *Mougeotiopsis*, and *Transeauina*. The research synthesizes historical nomenclature and classification changes, documenting the group’s redefinition as a distinct class and tracing the evolutionary relationships among its orders and species. Key findings include a revised understanding of species diversity and distribution, supported by data from AlgaeBase, which highlights the ecological scope of these algae in freshwater environments. The work establishes a foundational taxonomic framework for this lineage, which is critical for studies on streptophyte algae evolution and terrestrial plant origins.
